name: fujitsu-quantum
documentation: An official SDK for Fujitsu Quantum Cloud.

functions.name: fujitsu_quantum.logging.write_error_log
documentation:
Writes the given text to an error log file.

Returns:
    str: The error log file path

methods.name: fujitsu_quantum.auth.FjqAuthBoto3.refresh_auth
documentation:
Refreshes the access token.
If there is still time before the access token expires, this method does not refresh the access token to avoid
excessive token refresh requests.

classes.name: fujitsu_quantum.concurrent.futures.Executor
documentation: This class enables users to simultaneously submit multiple quantum tasks and retrieve results.

functions.name: fujitsu_quantum.plugins.qulacs.qasm.to_qasm
documentation:
Converts a Qulacs circuit to OpenQASM 3 code. The given circuit must contain only the following gates:
X, Y, Z, H, S, Sdag, T, Tdag, sqrtX, sqrtXdag, sqrtY, sqrtYdag, I, CNOT, CZ, SWAP, RX, RY, RZ,
ParametricRX, ParametricRY, ParametricRZ.

classes.name: fujitsu_quantum.requests.FjqRequestError
documentation:
Attributes:
    code: Response status code. It can be None if, for example, network errors occur.
    message: Error message.

methods.name: fujitsu_quantum.requests.FjqRequest._write_error_log
documentation:
Writes the error details to an error log file.

Returns:
    str: The error log file path.

methods.name: fujitsu_quantum.requests.FjqRequest.__request
documentation:
Parameters:
    method (str): HTTP method to use.
    exp_status_code (HTTPStatus): expected HTTP response status code.
    kwargs (Any): Additional parameters to pass to requests.

functions.name: fujitsu_quantum.plugins.qulacs.operators.to_operator_list
documentation:
Converts a Qulacs GeneralQuantumOperator to an operator list compatible with the 'operator' parameter of
Fujitsu Quantum Cloud Web APIs.

functions.name: fujitsu_quantum.plugins.openfermion.qiskit_operators.to_qiskit_operator
documentation: Converts an OpenFermion QubitOperator to a Qiskit SparsePauliOp.

functions.name: fujitsu_quantum.plugins.openfermion.operators.to_operator_list
documentation:
Converts an OpenFermion QubitOperator to an operator list compatible with the 'operator' parameter of
Fujitsu Quantum Cloud Web APIs.

modules.name: fujitsu_quantum.plugins.qiskit.primitives.fujitsu_estimator
documentation: This file provides a functionality to compute expectation values using Fujitsu backends,
which has been implemented by modifying the BackendSampler-related code in Qiskit.
This code is part of Qiskit.
This code is licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0. You may
obtain a copy of this license in the LICENSE.txt file in the root directory
of this source tree or at http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.
Any modifications or derivative works of this code must retain this
copyright notice, and modified files need to carry a notice indicating
that they have been altered from the originals.

methods.name: fujitsu_quantum.plugins.qiskit.primitives.fujitsu_estimator.FujitsuEstimator.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a new FujitsuEstimator instance

Args:
    backend: Required: the backend to run the primitive on
    options: Default options.
    bound_pass_manager: An optional pass manager to run after
        parameter binding.
    skip_transpilation: If this is set to True the internal compilation
        of the input circuits is skipped and the circuit objects
        will be directly executed when this object is called.

methods.name: fujitsu_quantum.plugins.qiskit.primitives.fujitsu_estimator.FujitsuEstimator.backend
documentation:
Returns:
    The backend which this estimator object based on

methods.name: fujitsu_quantum.plugins.qiskit.primitives.fujitsu_estimator.FujitsuEstimator.preprocessed_circuits
documentation:
Preprocessed quantum circuits produced by preprocessing
Returns:
    List of the transpiled quantum circuit
Raises:
    QiskitError: if the instance has been closed.

methods.name: fujitsu_quantum.plugins.qiskit.primitives.fujitsu_estimator.FujitsuEstimator.transpile_options
documentation: Return the transpiler options for transpiling the circuits.

methods.name: fujitsu_quantum.plugins.qiskit.primitives.fujitsu_estimator.FujitsuEstimator.set_transpile_options
documentation:
Set the transpiler options for transpiler.
Args:
    **fields: The fields to update the options

methods.name: fujitsu_quantum.plugins.qiskit.primitives.fujitsu_estimator.FujitsuEstimator.transpiled_circuits
documentation:
Transpiled quantum circuits.
Returns:
    List of the transpiled quantum circuit
Raises:
    QiskitError: if the instance has been closed.
